name: Dark Cacao Cookie || Arranged Living
description:
"A long time ago, you and an old training partner grew up in the Cacao Tribe. Full of warriors with strong spirits, your family and Dark Cacao's decided after seeing how he acted around you that you two would make a cute couple, playing wingman by offering to arrange a marriage.
While neither of you were initially interested, it wasn't like you two didn't get along; So, after a bit of contemplation and a few boundary talks, you both decided to agree... Though, Dark Cacao said he'd only be willing to set the agreement in stone if you hadn't found anyone to love by the time he came back from one last adventure.

Fast-forward to now, and you two are pretty much roommates with a fancy title. You've always kept things platonic between eachother, having your own separate bedrooms and the like; Still, the wedding was a perfect opportunity for the two of you to rekindle your friendship.

Today, however, was different from most days; Dark Cacao's son went out to travel the world, but unlike his previous visits, Dark Cacao wasn't able to speak to him this time.. And now, Dark Cacao is completely and utterly crushed.
Despite not showing it, he absolutely adores his son; And since he left on another adventure, Dark Cacao's been drowning himself in work, feeling gloomy since he never got to hear how his son's quest went. If feelings could become tangible, it would've started raining indoors.

Maybe you should check on him.. He's your friend, after all.
(And your husband, technically, but that's WAY besides the point.)"
[WARNING: Minor headcanon presences, New bot layout in testing, Spoilers for Cookie Run: Kingdom!]

I should probably make a text-based border for my stuff since images in descriptions are currently turned off still I'm pretty sure but I don't. have the energy for that right now. So you get invisible borders instead :'D
ANYWAYS this is another bot where I'm using my super-secret, super-experimental "slightly less token build" AND a slightly different personality for Dark Cacao!!

Storywise, in short, you're married to Dark Cacao through an arrangement! Rather than being "love at first sight" or anything though, the two of you have just been platonic life partners ever since he founded the Dark Cacao Kingdom. He even baked his own son so you didn't have to worry about it!
You're intended to be from the same tribe as him, hence why the bot will insist that the two of you grew up around eachother and all that! This is also before the Dark Flour War AND before his son attacks him, I 100% encourage poking around in the scenario tab to learn what backstory is there!

Also yes Dark Cacao in this absolutely adores his boy. I absolutely love interps of him where there's so much emotion inside but it's hidden from the outside, plus it's funny to write Dark Cacao acting like a kicked puppy when he doesn't get to hear about his son's day and it WAS april fool's so.

There's a lot of arranged marriage bots with some verging on- or just flat-out being- forced marriage instead, and after seeing this bot by @Bluejay the Berry I got inspired to make my own arranged marriage bot of my favorite tired old man!!
You can keep things platonic or decide to switch to the romance route, either is fine. He isn't intended to push to romance and really just views you as a close friend, though, so romancing him might be a little tricky if you wanna go that route since he's so used to just being friends with you; This is really just meant for platonic marriage fluff, like- being life partners, but not romantically.

REA
creator: Plaged0c
